scripts.build: cd frontend && npm install && npm run build
scripts.test:run: coverage run manage.py test; npm --prefix frontend test -- --watchAll=false
scripts.test:coverage: coverage html; npm --prefix frontend test -- --coverage --watchAll=false; echo 'Opening coverage reports...'; xdg-open htmlcov/index.html >/dev/null 2>&1 & xdg-open frontend/coverage/lcov-report/index.html >/dev/null 2>&1 &
